name: Verne
description: A frontier station on the rim of Reach space, technically under the ISC's trade-bloc jurisdiction, practically under whoever's willing to dock. Verne is where the Loup-Garou's crew learned to keep one eye on the manifest and the other on the docking bay. The Compact's bounty hunters pass through on the regular — the station is too small to refuse them, too lawless to be worth occupying. If you have a low trust with the Compact and a bad day, the bay controller will let you dock anyway. The Compact is the one who complains, later, in a system you are no longer in.
